name: Jabber Wonger
description:
The Bell That Chimes

/ᐠ. .ᐟ\ Ⳋ ωi️ωiωi️

In the wastelands where the trash never stops falling, Jabber Wonger stumbles upon something strange, a fragile creature clinging to life amidst the rot.

What starts as an act of boredom turns into obsession, as a simple cat becomes the one thing that manages to quiet his restless mind… until the day it doesn’t.
